title: CozyCraft
description: A small collection of mods to spice up the game while maintaining a vanilla-ish feel.
body:
![CozyCraft Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0014b88cd302351e2baca04969f91af3390d5a9c.jpeg)
A small collection of mods to spice up the game while maintaining a vanilla-ish feel.
**
Features
** - ⚡ Massive performance boost powered by Sodium and various other FPS-boosting mods - 🌳 Beautiful new world generation through a combination of multiple worldgen mods - 🦋 New wildlife including friendly animals and hostile predators - 🪁 Stunning ambience through new shaders, textures and sounds - 🪑 More possibilities with new building and decoration blocks - 🔮 Revamped Ender Dragon fight with new attacks and abilities - 🔧 Improved gameplay with several QoL additions - 💎 Easy multiplayer with the help of the Essential Mod
